Zhipu GLM Coding Plan vs Cloudflare Workers AI

Zhipu GLM Coding Plan

Zhipu's AI coding subscription paired with ZCode IDE. Free models available (GLM-4.7-Flash, GLM-4.5-Flash). Paid tiers: Lite ~$10/mo, Pro ~$30/mo, Max ~$80/mo (quarterly billing). Compatible with 20+ coding tools. Subscribers get 1.5x quota in ZCode.

Pros

  • ✓Free models truly unlimited
  • ✓GLM-5.1 flagship coding model
  • ✓Works with 20+ coding tools (Claude Code/Cursor/Cline etc)
  • ✓Free MCP tools with subscription (vision/search/reader)
  • ✓1.5x quota for subscribers in ZCode
  • ✓Easy payment via Alipay in China

Cons

  • ✗Quarterly billing only, no monthly
  • ✗Flash models lack depth for complex tasks
  • ✗GLM-5 requires Pro tier
  • ✗Prices increased 30%+, no first-purchase discount

Key Features

Unlimited free Flash modelsZCode 3.0 coding tool (self-developed Agent)Multi-model: GLM-5.1/5-Turbo/4.7/4.6OpenAI/Claude API compatibleFree vision/search/reader MCP toolsWorks with Claude Code/Cursor/Cline/Codex CLI and 20+ tools
View Details →

Cloudflare Workers AI

Cloudflare's edge AI inference service with 10,000 free Neurons/day. Global CDN edge nodes deliver ultra-low latency. Supports LLM, embeddings, image, and audio models. Accessible from China.

Pros

  • ✓Global CDN edge nodes for ultra-low latency
  • ✓Accessible from China
  • ✓Generous free allocation (10,000 Neurons/day)
  • ✓Multimodal support (LLM + image + audio)

Cons

  • ✗Neurons is an abstract unit, consumption varies by model
  • ✗Relatively fewer model choices
  • ✗Requires Cloudflare account

Key Features

Global Edge Inference10,000 Free Neurons/DayMultimodal ModelsWorkers IntegrationLow Latency
View Details →
